intro: hi — thank you for visiting my page.
absatz1: If you like to know, here is a little bit about me: i am a communication designer based near Hamburg.
absatz2: I've been visualizing digital and print communication for more than 15 years now — and I still get excited every time a new project starts. I love good typography, clean layouts and excited by the unexpected.
absatz3: I've worked in both classic advertising and on the corporate side, so I've seen brands from pretty much every angle. What I love most is helping companies find and shape their identity — turning ideas into something real and meaningful.
absatz4: I'm a big believer in good teamwork and enjoy exploring new directions together with my clients (and even better, in interdisciplinary teams). I'm persistent when it comes to getting great results — and nothing makes me happier than seeing clients genuinely excited about the outcome.
abschluss: Don't be shy and come in contact, I'm looking forward to get to know you.
